mapper.select:
SELECT NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(r.res_date, 'YYYY-MM') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM') THEN p.pay_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS thisMonthSales,
NVL(SUM(p.pay_amount), 0) AS totalSales,
COUNT(CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(r.res_date, 'YYYY-MM') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM') THEN 1 END) AS thisMonthResCount,
COUNT(r.res_no) AS totalResCount
FROM RESERVATION r JOIN SPACE_UNIT u ON r.unit_no = u.unit_no JOIN SPACE s ON u.space_no = s.space_no JOIN PAYMENT p ON r.res_no = p.res_no WHERE s.host_id = #{hostId} AND p.pay_status = 'PAID' AND r.status IN ('RESERVED', 'COMPLETED')
